programme.desc: Bath Rugby v Saracens (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the match from The Recreation Ground. The last time these two sides met was at the end of November with Bath coming out on top thanks to an entertaining 36-29 victory. Saracens had led 22-17 at half-time before three tries in the second half from the hosts turned the game on its head. This is the first of two meetings between the two sides in the space of 15 days, with the next meeting coming in a round-of-16 tie in the European Champions Cup in early April.

programme.desc: The China Open climax sees Jannik Sinner and Carlos Alcaraz get set for a second final meeting. Sinner aims to defend the crown, while Alcaraz looks to avenge last year's defeat.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: In a rematch of the 2023 Madrid Open final, world number one Iga Swiatek and defending champion Aryna Sabalenka meet again to determine this year's women's singles champion.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: Andre Agassi and Pete Sampras met in the 2001 Indian Wells final - one of 34 career meetings. Agassi eyed a second consecutive win over Sampras in their first meeting in over a year.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: In the 1996 Indian Wells final, Steffi Graf - having made her competitive return after a four-month injury layoff - would compete with Spain's Conchita Martinez for the title.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: In a battle of generations, two of the all-time greats Roger Federer and Andre Agassi fought for the year-end championship in 2003. Federer was aiming for his first title on American soil.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: Meeting for the first time in a final at tour level, the Williams sisters Venus and Serena went toe to toe in an emotionally charged contest for the Miami Open title.

programme.title: WTA Final: Miami
programme.desc: In Miami, the women's final get underway as top seed Aryna Sabalenka meets with home favourite Jessica Pegula in a repeat of last year's US Open decider. (29.

programme.title: ATP Final: Miami
programme.desc: Chasing a record seventh men's Miami crown, Novak Djokovic - now the oldest ATP Masters 1000 finalist - takes on Jakub Mensik, aiming to win his first tour-level trophy. (30.

programme.title: WTA Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: World number one Aryna Sabalenka and two-time Grand Slam winner Elena Rybakina meet in a rematch of the 2026 Australian Open and the 2023 Indian Wells finals - both won by Rybakina. (15.

programme.title: ATP Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: Jannik Sinner competes in his first Indian Wells final as the world number two goes up against re-emerging force Daniil Medvedev, who stunned Carlos Alcaraz in the last four. (15.

programme.title: WTA Final: Dubai
programme.desc: Meeting for the first time in a final, 31-year-olds Jessica Pegula and Elina Svitolina vie for the Dubai crown. Svitolina bids to end an eight-year wait for her third title here. (21.

programme.title: WTA Final: Ostrava
programme.desc: Katie Boulter targets her fourth career title as the former world number 23 faces Germany's Tamara Korpatsch in the Ostrava final. Boulter will return to the top 100 with victory. (07.
